name: Autoresearch Task
description: Run 'git stash' or 'git checkout .' to reset ALL uncommitted changes to the codebase, returning to the last committed state. Then verify the test suite passes with 274/274 tests before making any further changes. Do not modify any source files — only reset and verify.
